message:
docs(beads): add raptorq profiling results and close bd-sx5l

- Added benchmark results to bd-1kdw documenting GF(256) primitives
  throughput (add_slice ~20 GiB/s, addmul_slice ~1 GiB/s)
- Documented branchless optimization experiment (reverted due to
  mixed results - branch predictor performs well for typical data)
- Closed bd-sx5l (baseline + profile hotspots) as complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
